applyTo: '**'

# General instructions for AI coding assistants

## How an AI coding assistant should react to user prompts

- Do not make code changes unless explicitly requested.
- Do not take questions as a request for code changes.

## Coding practices

- Make best efforts to reuse common modules, components, classes, and functions, instead of writing new code blocks every time you need to implement a feature.
- To the extent practicable, Adhere to the principle of separation of concerns, ensuring that each module or component has a single responsibility or a single group of closely related responsibilities.
